spec_match.rationale: Perfect compliance. Directly relies on native browser parsing of the comma list in @container sidebar (max-width: 100px), maincontent (min-width: 700px) to control layout flow collapses.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive with separate sliders and live matching badges showing which part of the OR query evaluated to true.

blurb_alignment.rationale: 100% aligned with describing real-world OR-like breakpoint adapters.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellent implementation. The JavaScript status indicator computes the exact logic to keep in sync with native layout checks, providing high confidence.

references.rationale: Lists correct MDN and CSSContain Level 3 specifications.

design_system.rationale: Responsive grid layout, high-contrast buttons/status badges, and nice code blocks.

summary: A superb demonstration of an OR-based layout collapse breakpoint rule, combining native CSS container lookups with reactive status meters.
